memoryArtifacts.description: Origin Displayed: English - Spelling variations of this family name include: Purefoy, Purefield, Purefree, Purefrey, Purfrey, Purfry and many more. First found in Leicestershire where they were seated from very early times and were granted lands by Duke William of Normandy, their liege Lord, for their distinguished assistance at the Battle of Hastings in 1066 A.D. Some of the first settlers of this family name or some of its variants were: Lieutenant Purfrey who settled in Virginia in 1623; Lucy Purefoy, who settled in Virginia in 1629; Samuell Purefoy, who came to St. Christopher (New England) in 1633. (From www.HouseOfNames.com Archives copyright  2000 - 2009).

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Purefoy於1448年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙爾斯同時，他的父親William Purefoy IV69歲，母親Margery Moton52歲。他於1471年與Joan Wistowe在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年1月9日享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾分尼 德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Purefoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French par fei ‘by (my) faith’, a nickname for someone who habitually used this expression. Compare Purifoy . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Purefoy was born in 1448, in Shalstone, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Purefoy IV, was 69 and his mother, Margery Moton, was 52. He married Joan Wistowe in 1471, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 January 1492, at the age of 44, and was buried in Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Purefoy est né en 1448, à Shalstone, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Purefoy IV, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Margery Moton, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Joan Wistowe en 1471, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1492, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Fenny Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Purefoyが1448年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアシャルストーンで生まれた時，父William Purefoy IVは69歳，母Margery Motonは52歳であった。1471年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンでJoan Wistoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1492年1月9日に44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアフエニー ドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Purefoy(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 샤스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Purefoy IV(은)는 69세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Moton(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Joan Wistowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 1월 9일 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 펜이 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Wistowe em 1471, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Purefoy родился в 1448 г. в местности шолстоун, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Purefoy IV было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Moton, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Wistowe в 1471 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1492 г. в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности фенни дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
